name: Paw Performance Polo-XL men Blue
description: Stay stylish and show your love for furry friends with this women’s small-fit polo in a refreshing blue tone. Made from a soft, breathable cotton-poly blend, it features an elegant embroidered paw print design that represents both cat and dog companionship — subtle, sweet, and full of heart. Size: Small (Women’s Fit) Color: Blue Material: Lightweight cotton-poly blend for comfort and ease Design: Embroidered dual paw print (cat & dog paws) Fit: Slim, feminine cut with capped sleeves and a flattering silhouette Care: Machine washable for easy upkeep Perfect for pet lovers who want to keep their look polished while honoring their favorite companion
shortDescription: Stay stylish and show your love for furry friends with this women’s small-fit polo in a refreshing blue tone. Made from a soft, breathable cotton-poly
